title: KUAK Extra Large Yoga Mat Bag and Carriers with Yoga Mat Strap, Top Full-Zip Closure, Bottle Pocket/Big Open Pocket and Zipper Pockets, Quality Canvas Women Tote Bag for Gym Sports
features: 【LARGE CAPACITY】Size: L30"xH11"xW9". KUAK large yoga mat bag for women/men is big enough to hold yoga gear you needs, such as yoga mats, yoga blocks, belts, yoga clothing, towels, water bottle, etc. Fits most size mats, such as 3mm / 4mm /5mm /6mm/10mm yoga mat.
【BONUS】Comes with an adjustable yoga mat strap which fits all size mats. The strap can also be used as a yoga strap to hold poses and physical therapy.
【LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE】Made of 8 oz environmental friendly cotton canvas. The wide shoulder straps can reduce stress on the shoulders. Featuring sturdy zippers, durable canvas and reinforcing seams.

【ZIP CLOSURE & 5 POCKETS】Designed with top zipper closure, prevent items from falling out of the bag. A large main compartment for yoga gear; three zipped pockets for smartphone, credit cards, cash and other valuables; one large front pocket for easy access to small items; one pocket for water bottle. It is handy for organizing and quickly accessing items.
【MULTIPURPOSE】This bag not only can be used as a yoga mat bag, but also as a gym bag, sports bag, shopping bag, travel bag, etc. The wonderful gift for yoga lovers.
description: KUAK large yoga mat bag easily holds all of yoga gear in a bag, comes with free yoga mat strap It can be used as a yoga bag, gym bag, sports bag, shopping bag, travel bag, etc. Features and Benefits 1. LARGE CAPACITY - sized at L30"xH11"xW9", fits all of your yoga gear in a bag 2. LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE - Made of 8 oz high quality canvas 3. WIDE SHOULDER STRAPS - reduce stress on the shoulders and carry easily 4. TOP ZIPPER CLOSURE - prevent items from falling out of the bag 5. MULTIPLE POCKETS - one zipped inner pocket, two zipped back pockets, one large front pocket and one water bottle pocket, handy for sorting, organizing and quickly accessing items 6. EASY TO CLEAN - machine washable, easy to clean 7. Environmental Friendly cotton canvas, NO bad smell 8. UNISEX This yoga bag is friendly to both women and men 9. COMES WITH YOGA MAT STRAP Applicable Scene It's perfectly be used as a yoga mat tote bag, suitable for most sizes of yoga mats, blocks, belts, yoga clothing, towels and water bottle. It effortlessly doubles as a gym bag, sports bag, shopping bag, travel bag, etc. Quality Guarantee KUAK large yoga mat bags and carriers provide 60 days Guarantee (30 days for Money-Back and 60 days for a replacement)! If you are not happy with the yoga bag for any reason - get a full refund! If you have any problems, feel free to contact us. Product Detials 1. Product Name: KUAK Yoga Mat Bag 2. Product Size: L30"xH11"xW9" 3. Material: 8 oz canvas 4. Comes with yoga mat strap
